name: Windmill Workflow Automation MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Windmill — the open-source workflow automation and developer platform for running scripts, flows, and apps. Enables AI agents to trigger Windmill jobs, manage workflows, query job results, and orchestrate automation scripts written in Python, TypeScript, Bash, SQL, and more. Self-hostable alternative to Airplane/Retool for internal tools.
use_cases: Triggering Windmill workflow executions from AI agent orchestration layers
Querying job results and workflow status from automation monitoring agents
Managing Windmill flows and scripts from DevOps automation agents
Executing data transformation and ETL pipelines from data workflow agents
not_for: Organizations without Windmill infrastructure (self-hosted or Windmill Cloud required)
Simple cron jobs without code (Windmill is developer-focused)
best_when: A developer team using Windmill wants AI agents to trigger automation scripts and workflows — enabling intelligent orchestration of Windmill's scriptable automation capabilities.
avoid_when: You need a no-code automation tool. Windmill requires coding skills. AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Autonomous job execution can affect production systems and data.

auth.notes: Windmill API tokens generated per user or service account. Token-based authentication. Self-hosted Windmill requires managing your own auth infrastructure.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Self-hosted is free; Windmill Cloud free tier available
pricing.notes: Windmill is open source with AGPL license. Self-hosted is free. Cloud hosting adds convenience at cost.

performance.rate_limits: Depends on self-hosted infrastructure or Windmill Cloud plan

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Autonomous job execution can affect production systems
Self-hosted deployments require custom TLS and auth configuration
Job outputs may contain sensitive data — agents must handle securely
Windmill flow complexity scales with script logic — test thoroughly before agent triggering
Community MCP — verify against latest Windmill API version
agent_readiness.security_notes: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Automation platform can execute arbitrary scripts. Self-hosted data residency. API token auth. Script outputs may contain sensitive data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Automation platform executing arbitrary code. Self-hosted data residency. AUTHORIZED USE ONLY for production job triggering.
